name: Toy Castle
description:
The iterator designed to work in a group is completely alone. By adding the power of its own supercomputer with the surviving parts of others, it has made itself a hostage of its own computational power.

rain worl, rw, rain world, iterator, metal can, yummy neurons, brain eating

Char is still in the early stages of development, I'll be optimizing his description. Report where it goes wrong, and most of the problems I vouch to fix. I use bots to study the behavior of my characters, but you can have fun with this dink.

The cover image was created by me. If you like it, I give you permission to use it for non-commercial purposes and all that. Bleh

My first bot ever.

Also it's my "self-insert"* OC in some way

I'm not going to ascend myself

Btw I'll be homeless soon, it's a good time to remember Lenin

*Of course, I'm less cute than a metal can

sait
creator: greenscug
